config.script:
#include "L50203" #include "L50217"
'return current transaction function navo_client_get_trans() dim oTrans : set oTrans = trans_.get_this() set navo_client_get_trans = oTrans end function
'initialize client session (perform unattended login) function navo_client_init(byval strUser, byval strPassword) navo_client_init = doc_.getmodule(60121).remote_system_init(strUser, strPassword) end function
function navo_client_create_aspator(oInputStream, oOutputStream)
dim oAspator set oAspator = doc_.system.activex("navocomutil.aspator")
oAspator.init oInputStream, oOutputStream, trans_.get_this(), true
set navo_client_create_aspator = oAspator
end function
function navo_client_make_pdf(iType, idObj, idPubType) dim oDocument : set oDocument = trans_.getobj(iType, idObj)
if idPubType = 0 then dim eTypRej : eTypRej = clng(0) select case iType case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ, TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE eTypRej = oDocument.pRejestrDok.eTyp end select
if eTypRej <> 0 then dim strPubType : strPubType = get_where_for_pub_by_rejtyp(eTypRej)
dim arrParts: arrParts = split(strPubType, PUB_TYPES_SEPARATOR) if ubound(arrParts) > -1 then strPubType = arrParts(0) 'once again split arrParts = split(strPubType,",") strPubType = arrParts(0) else strPubType = "-1" end if
end if else strPubType = cstr(idPubType) end if
dim idPub: idPub = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5DPC," pDocTemplate = 0 and eChannel = 1 and ePubType=" + strPubType)
if idPub <= 0 then navo_client_make_pdf = ":bad publication id" exit function end if dim pM60170 : set pM60170 = doc_.getmodule(60170)
navo_client_make_pdf = pM60170.generate_to_pdf_by_iddpc(oDocument, idPub, "PDF_" + cstr(oDocument.type) + "_" + cstr(oDocument.IdObj)+ "_" + cstr(idPub)) 'navo_client_make_pdf = pM60170.generate_to_pdf_by_iddpc(oDocument, idPub)
end function
'2022-10-26
function navo_client_recalc_store() navo_client_recalc_store = false dim pNAVOGMSrvr : set pNAVOGMSrvr = trans_.CreateServerExtension("navogm.n5gmsvr") dim varLog 'ma być pusty jeśli nie chcemy logować
if pNAVOGMSrvr.validate(varLog) then setglobprofile GLOBPROF_GM_BORDER,clng(GM_BORDER_ALL_RIGHT) if trans_.saveobjects() then trans_.message 0, 0, "navo_client_recalc_store OK" navo_client_recalc_store = true exit function end if end if
trans_.message 0, 0, "navo_client_recalc_store error" end function
